summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Music Hub iteration 3 with extended songwriting credits database (57 artists). All backend APIs, frontend UI, and specific feature requirements are working perfectly. French language UI, extended anecdotes/ghostwriting data, YouTube links, and all integrations functioning correctly.
passed_tests: All 39 backend API endpoints (100% success rate)
Ed Sheeran returns exactly 4 anecdotes and 9 songs as required
Beyoncé returns anecdotes about surprise album release
Prince returns 'Nothing Compares 2 U' for Sinéad O'Connor
Jack Antonoff returns songs written for Taylor Swift and Lorde
Stromae returns French artist data with Belgian/Rwandan background
Avicii returns EDM artist data with anecdotes and songs
Unknown Artist correctly returns found:false with empty data
Sia shows 'Diamonds' for Rihanna in ghostwriting section
YouTube 'Écouter' links present for songs with youtube_id
Artist pages display anecdotes and ghostwriting sections correctly
Daft Punk (Deezer ID 27) shows Discogs member data
Ed Sheeran (Deezer ID 384236) artist page with complete anecdotes/ghostwriting
Billboard Hot 100 current week and year-end charts (2010-2025)
Billboard year selector functionality working correctly
Blind Test game with player name entry, YouTube player, and 4 answer choices
Home page search autocomplete with artist navigation
French language UI throughout the application
Navigation between all pages using header links and feature cards
Responsive design and proper styling maintained
